budget.title: Personnel costs budget
budget.description: The personnel cost budget serves as a rough cost estimate and must be defined as a guide before project planning.

planned-costs.title: Personnel costs plan
planned-costs.description: The planned personnel costs result from the salaries entered in the employee administration in conjunction with the project plan.

expenses.title: Personnel costs
expenses.description: The actual personnel costs result from the hours recorded in the time recording and linked to the project.

budget.title: Contractors budget
budget.description: The subcontract budget serves as the basis for subcontractor planning and must be defined in advance.

planned-costs.title: Contractors plan
planned-costs.description: The planned costs of the project for subcontractors must be specified in more detail for the application.

expenses.title: Contractors
expenses.description: The actual costs for subcontractors are derived from the invoices recorded in the cost center.

budget.title: Other costs budget
budget.description: The budget for material and material costs as well as for project-related depreciation is used for later cost control.

planned-costs.title: Other costs plan
planned-costs.description: You can plan other costs in detail here in order to check eligibility for funding and for increased planning security for the budget.

expenses.title: Other costs
expenses.description: The other costs incurred result from invoices recorded and linked to projects as well as information on depreciation and amortization.

project_cost_overview.categorize_invoices_banner: Upload your invoices for contractors and other costs to cross-check with the planned cost

main.short title muss ausgefüllt werden. (and: Short title should be filled out.
main.Please create the project outline, which: Please create the project outline, which describes your research project and represents the heart of your SFF application.

Please create the project outline, which describes your research project and represents the heart of your SFF application. Make sure the document meets the detailed requirements shown in the questionnaire to stand a chance of approval at the check.
main.In order to assess the eligibility of th: In order to assess the eligibility of the company and the project, some commercial data is required for the application, which we have summarized for you in a clear list of questions. There is a project-related and a company-related list of questions
main.Now submit the application in the BSFZ p: Now submit the application in the BSFZ portal and confirm the submission here to change the status of the project to under review.
main.If you have received the acknowledgment: If you have received the acknowledgment of receipt, please enter the date of the acknowledgment of receipt here for complete documentation.
main.Check your mailbox regularly. Any questi: Check your mailbox regularly. Any questions can be expected after about 20 days and will be answered within a period of 30 days. To ensure that the documentation is complete, please archive queries and related comments here.
main.In draft and versioning mode you can cre: In draft and versioning mode you can create a project plan without other people being able to see the work status. In this mode you can also use the wizard or restore old versions.
main.The wizard structures the necessary info: The wizard structures the necessary information for the initial generation of the project plan in simple and clearly understandable steps. Our AI then creates a plan for you, which you only have to adjust.
main.There is no timer running or passed for: There is no timer running or passed for selected task.
main.There is no task for this status, Please: There is no task for this status, Please change filters.
There is no subtask for selected task.
main.There is no subtask for selected task, i: There is no subtask for selected task, if you want press on plus button to create first subtask.
main.You can select a task to view and edit i: You can select a task to view and edit it.
main.You need to select a workplan or task fr: You need to select a workplan or task from sidebar to set az parent.

main.Please select type of research project: Please select type of research project
main.In-house research Description: Executed solely by internal resources and personnel within the organization, without any involvement of external contractors or outsourced activities.
main.france In-house research Description: The project exclusively involves activities performed by the employees of the applicant company.
main.Partial in-house research Description: Combination of internal efforts and resources with selective outsourced activities or subcontracted work to external parties.
main.Contract research Description: Entirely executed by external contractors or third-party service providers, with no internal resources allocated from the organization.
main.france Contract research Description: The expenses of the project consist exclusively of orders placed with third parties. No in-house personnel costs were incurred as part of the project.
main.Please enter at least three meaningful k: Please enter at least three meaningful keywords in the context of your R&D project. Keywords can consist of numbers, letters and special characters.
main.To change the project status these pages: To change the project status these pages of company data need to be filled
main.Research branch related to the R&D proje: Research branch related to the R&D project
main.Subcategory related to the selected rese: Subcategory related to the selected research branch

scheduled_hours.information_box_content: The scheduled hours are automatically generated from the created project plan and evenly distributed across the various work packages using AI. If you want to manually change the planned hours, make sure that the total number of hours remains the same.

sidebar.worked_hours: <percentage>{{workedPercentage}}%</percentage> of the contractually agreed working hours ({{hoursToWork}} hours)

popover.title: Upload Scan of Signed Timesheets
popover.description: Download the timesheets, sign them, and then upload a scan here to complete the confirmation.

popover.title: Confirm with eSignature
popover.description: To digitally confirm your timesheets, you and your supervisor will each receive an email from which you must make the confirmation.

subsidies.title: Annual Confirmation of Hourly Records
subsidies.description: As an alternative to individually confirming each month, you can also download annual hourly records, sign them, and upload a scan of them here. This confirms all months at the same time.

tutorial.title: How to select the day range?
tutorial.step_one_description: Click on the first day in the range. While holding the mouse button, drag across the desired range of days. Release the mouse button to complete the selection.
tutorial.step_two_description: Click on the first day, hold down the Shift key, and then click on the last day to highlight the entire range.

decimal_converter.title: Decimal Converter
decimal_converter.description: Time is recorded in decimal hours to make calculations easier. To convert minutes to decimal hours, simply divide the minutes by 60.

table.cancel_confirmation_to_edit_hours: To update the hours, please cancel the confirmation first.
table.cancel_timetracking_to_edit_hours: To update the hours, please switch to manual mode first.

change_work_items.cant_remove_with_hours: Work items with hours assigned can't be removed from the timesheet. Please remove the hours from the work item and try again.
change_work_items.hours_will_be_removed_warning: You currently have hours added for this task. If you continue, those hours will be deleted.

promptModal.time_tracking_hours_disabled_message: Switching to Manual mode will disable automatic time tracking. Your previous time tracking data will remain intact and accessible
promptModal.time_tracking_hours_enabled_message: Switching to Time Tracking Mode will delete all your current manual timesheet entries.
promptModal.time_tracking_hours_enabled_success: Manuel entries deleted. Switched to Time Tracking mode successfully.
promptModal.error: Failed to change mode. Please try again or contact support.
promptModal.checkbox_label: I understand that switching to Time Tracking Mode will delete all existing entries.

main.Goal of the project intro: Motivation, goals and intended results. To what extent does this aim? Projects aim to expand the state of knowledge/technology or existing scientific, technical, economic or other relevant insights or approaches to use?
main.Goal of the project li 1: 1 sentence state of the art (current/according to the state of the art...
main.Goal of the project li 2: 1 sentence project goal (the goal of the project is…)
main.Goal of the project li 3: 1 sentence delimitation of the state of the art (The state of the art is expanded with regard to..., whereby the knowledge of... is expanded.)
main.Goal of the project li 4: 1 sentence of project result (planned result is…)
main.Goal of the project bold: Make sure that the project uses specific technical terms to describe the innovative core. Extremely important, especially for software projects!
main.Description of the work intro: Which work steps/tasks and methods are/were used to achieve the goal? To what extent are new approaches being pursued (for your company and/or the industry)?
main.Description of the work li 2: 1 final sentence new approach (new approach is included…)
main.Innovationsgrad bold: Is the project aimed at a product, production process, production line, service or scientific methodology that represents a significant further development/novelty in relation to the relevant economic sector?
main.Innovationsgrad intro: If yes, please explain. Briefly describe the research or development status of the industry and differentiate your product, production process, production line, service or scientific methodology from it. Describe any new scientific/technical methods or approaches or procedures being used. (Examples include: experiments, field studies, observations, cohort studies.)
main.Innovationsgrad li 1: 1 sentence of target division/product class and delimitation of the state of the art (The project aims at... which should exceed the state of the art in terms of...)
main.Innovationsgrad li 2: 2 to 4 sentences of delimitation State of the art with approx. 2 parameters for delimitation
main.covers bold: Is there a specific connection between the project and existing products, production lines, production processes, services or already established scientific methodology in your company?
main.covers intro: If yes, make it clear to what extent the project's work goes beyond routine development services that are usual in your company. Explain the differentiation from existing products, production lines, production processes and services in the company. How does the product, process or service to be developed differ from those that your company already offers?
main.covers li 1: 1 set of current technologies in the company
main.covers li 2: 1 sentence demarcation functionality (for the first time...)
main.covers li 3: 2 to 4 sentences defining functionality and development methods
main.Risks bold: Explanation of the scientific and/or technical risks in implementing the project
main.Risks intro: Explain which engineering, natural, humanities or social science obstacles can be identified for the solution to your project. Describe the scientific (referring to all branches of science) and/or technical obstacles, risks, uncertainties or challenges that could lead to the failure of the project. Describe how you deal with existing risks. Briefly explain milestones and termination criteria. We expressly point out that there are no economic and/or financial risks to be mentioned here - in relation to the later product/process.
main.Risks li 1: 3 risks according to the diagram above
main.This page has been locked for editing fo: This page has been locked for editing for this step and needs to be unlocked for editing
main.Information about submission intro: After submission, you should regularly check your email inbox for any queries and approval or rejection notices. You have certain deadlines for answering questions and objecting in the event of rejection, which must not be exceeded.
main.Information about submission intro 2: You should therefore check your mailbox at least every 10 days. Use the date field below to be automatically reminded.
main.final decision rd: Your application is currently being reviewed. You will receive a notification as soon as the project has been approved or rejected. The status will change automatically.
main.Final Decision intro: If your application is ultimately rejected, you do not wish to appeal against an initial rejection or the application has been accepted, please fill out this section with the relevant details.
main.approval intro: If you have received an approval notice, upload it here, document the date and press “Project has been approved” to change the status of the project to Ongoing.
main.Rejection intro: If you have received a final rejection notice or you do not want to appeal an initial rejection notice, upload the notice here, document the date and press “Project has been approved” to change the status of the project to Rejected.
main.Confirmation of receipt intro: If you have received the confirmation of receipt, please enter the date of the confirmation of receipt here for complete documentation.

timesheet_calendar.absence_day_warning: Please remove the working hours entered for this day first.

main.The project has not been submitted yet: The project has not been submitted yet
main.Mailbox has not been checked yet: Mailbox has not been checked yet
You need to unlock this section on top of the page and then edit the fields.
main.project overview intro planing - randd: In the planning phase, gather key data and documents for R&D projects. Complete all fields for project and organization details and finalize plans and detailed cost estimates, including for subcontractors. This process helps prepare comprehensive R&D project plans.
main.project overview intro planing: In the application phase, the data and documents required for the BSFZ application are collected. Fill out the fields marked as required in the project data and in the company data, create a finalized project plan and fill out the cost planning for the subcontractors.
main.project overview intro inReview: Your application is currently being processed by the BSFZ. Check your mailbox regularly for queries and notifications and document the process accordingly in the project data. If you receive approval, you can change the status of the project to Ongoing, or if it is finally rejected, you can change it to Rejected.
main.project overview intro inReview rd: Your project is now under executive review. You will be notified once a decision is made, and the status will change automatically. Check the comments on the right for any feedback.
main.project overview intro inReview rd cfo:
As the decision-maker, please use the project data, planning and cost planning to check whether you want to approve this project and pass this decision on to the project managers here.

Please ask any questions or formulate the reasons for your decision in the comment function on the right.
main.project overview intro onGoing: Your project has been successfully approved. For a successful and legally secure application to the tax office, make sure that you carry out the documentation properly. This includes regular reports in task management as well as timely maintained time recording.
main.project overview intro rejected: Your project was ultimately rejected. In some circumstances, a successful resubmission can be made. Contact your innoscripta customer advisor for a free consultation. When submitting a new project, you can make a copy of the project.
main.project overview intro rejected 2: You can hide the project at any time to keep your project overview clean. Hidden projects can be shown again in the filters of the project overview.
main.project overview intro completed: This project has been completed. No further editing can be done.
main.project overview intro onGoing 2: No requirements. The project status can be manually changed to Completed
main.The tax number must be 10-13 digits long: The tax number must be 10-13 digits long.
main.Please enter at least 3 digits for postc: Please enter at least 3 digits for postcode.

main.For a legally compliant SFF submission,: For a legally compliant SFF submission, the project documentation must be kept conscientiously and cleanly. Here you can see the corresponding warning messages.

PMHint.title: What is a Personnel Month (PM)?
PMHint.desc1: A Personnel Month (PM) represents the default monthly work capacity of an employee, based on the legally requirements that employee is subject to. It provides a standardized way to measure effort across projects, assuming full-time work availability.
PMHint.desc2: This value reflects the maximum effort an employee can dedicate in a month, according to their weekly working hours.
PMHint.input_hint: Enter default working hours to calculate PM:
